description_long: This is a compact, modern tactical rifle with a matte camouflage finish, featuring a polymer lower receiver and a metal upper receiver with a full-length Picatinny rail on top. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine, a pistol grip, and a collapsible or adjustable stock at the rear. The barrel is relatively short, optimized for maneuverability in close-quarters urban environments, and is fitted with a simple muzzle device. Iron sights are mounted on the rail, with both front and rear sights visible. The overall design is ergonomic, with textured surfaces for improved grip and control, and the rifle appears robust and suitable for rapid deployment.
description: A compact, camouflaged tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, short barrel, iron sights, and a detachable box magazine. Its design is modern and optimized for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and Picatinny rail with iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, front sight, and the width of the stock and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine, and the overall compactness of the rifle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the upper rail.
